title: Feeling Human
content:
Feeling Human

The feeling person: a symbol for understanding the human being.

Today, it is accepted that every emotion such as anger, hatred, hatred, love has a biochemical counterpart in the brain.

Uskudar University Feeling Human symbol symbolizes the activation of good emotions and keeping good emotions alive instead of malicious emotions.

Those who can create awareness about emotions are the lucky ones who feel the "Feeling Human" and life.

The Feeling Human is a representative of human values that reminds us of the importance of thinking, helping, helping, receiving help and being emotional in order to be happy.

Prof. Nevzat TARHAN

President
